title: Appeal proofs of evidence and witness timings
description: Schema proofs of evidence and witness timings provided by a party on an appeal

serviceUserId.description: Maps to [ServiceUser].[id], will be rule 6, agent or appellant

lpaCode.description: A unique identifier for the Local Planning Authority
lpaCode.$comment: Uses the internal PINS code identifying LPAs

submittedDate.description: The date the proofs/witness timings was submitted by the user

items.description: The unique identifier for the document, maps to [AppealDocument].[id]
